skill.name: seo-meta-optimizer
skill.description: Creates optimized SEO meta titles, descriptions, URL suggestions, and variation sets using character limits, keyword placement, and click-focused copy guidelines.
skill.summary: Generate search-ready meta titles, descriptions, URLs, and SEO copy variations.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: AI review found no confirmed malicious behavior in the single scanned SKILL.md file. The external command, weak cryptography, and network reconnaissance alerts are false positives caused by Markdown formatting and ordinary SEO guidance, not executable code or network behavior.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backticks Misread as Shell Execution
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported Ruby or shell backtick execution at SKILL.md lines 25 and 73-77. Line 25 is an inline Markdown file reference, and lines 73-77 are a fenced output example for SEO metadata, so no command execution path is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged text is Markdown syntax only. There is no script file, interpreter directive, variable interpolation, or executable command context.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern in SEO Text
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported weak cryptographic algorithm indicators at SKILL.md lines 3, 33, 54, 67, and 76, including a duplicate report for line 3. These lines describe meta descriptions, optimization, and example SEO copy; no cryptographic API, hashing function, or credential handling appears.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The semantic context is SEO metadata, not cryptography. No code invokes MD5, SHA1, DES, RC4, or any similar weak algorithm.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Freshness Guidance Misread as Network Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported network reconnaissance at SKILL.md line 51. The line recommends adding numbers or a year for content freshness in title tags, and it does not perform DNS lookup, port scanning, HTTP requests, or host discovery.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line is plain instructional content for SEO copywriting. No networking command, URL target, socket use, or reconnaissance workflow is present.

content.user_title: Optimize SEO Meta Tags for Search Results
content.value_statement: Search snippets often lose clicks when titles, descriptions, and URLs are too vague or too long. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code produce keyword-focused metadata with clear length checks and variation ideas.
actual_capabilities: Creates SEO-friendly URL suggestions with lowercase words, hyphens, and primary keyword placement.
Drafts title tags around recommended 50 to 60 character guidance.
Drafts meta descriptions around recommended 150 to 160 character guidance.
Generates three to five metadata variations for comparison or A/B testing.
Suggests power words, emotional triggers, calls to action, and plugin settings for common publishing platforms.
Provides character count validation for generated titles and descriptions.
limitations: It does not perform live keyword research or search volume analysis.
It does not verify real Google truncation, because pixel width varies by device and font.
It depends on the content, keyword, audience, and brand details supplied by the user.
The referenced implementation playbook is not included in the scanned file structure.

use_cases.title: Prepare Blog Metadata
use_cases.description: Create titles, descriptions, and URLs for new articles before publication.

use_cases.title: Refresh Existing Pages
use_cases.description: Rewrite weak search snippets with clearer benefits, keywords, and calls to action.

use_cases.title: Ship Site Meta Fields
use_cases.description: Convert page goals into metadata options for WordPress, Astro, Next.js, or similar sites.

prompt_templates.title: Create Basic Meta Tags
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a new page.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create SEO metadata for this page. Topic: [topic]. Primary keyword: [keyword]. Audience: [audience]. Brand: [brand]. Provide a URL, title, description, and character counts.

prompt_templates.title: Improve Existing Metadata
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request for rewriting current snippets.
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this existing metadata and improve it. Current URL: [url]. Current title: [title]. Current description: [description]. Primary keyword: [keyword]. Keep the tone [tone].

prompt_templates.title: Build A/B Test Variations
prompt_templates.prompt: Create five SEO metadata variations for this page. Use different emotional triggers, calls to action, and title structures. Explain the angle behind each variation.

prompt_templates.title: Plan Platform Implementation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create optimized metadata for this page and include implementation notes for [WordPress, Astro, or Next.js]. Include title, description, URL, plugin or component guidance, and validation checks.

output_examples.input: A guide page about project management software for small agencies.
output: Title: Project Management Software for Agencies | Acme
Description: Compare agency project tools, improve delivery, and choose software that keeps client work on schedule.

output_examples.input: An ecommerce category page for organic dog food with a friendly brand voice.
output: Title: Organic Dog Food for Healthy Daily Meals | Brand
Description: Shop organic dog food made with simple ingredients, balanced nutrition, and flavors dogs enjoy every day.

output_examples.input: A SaaS pricing page that needs stronger click appeal.
output: Title: Simple SaaS Pricing Plans That Scale | Brand
Description: Choose a flexible plan, compare features, and start with pricing built for growing teams.

best_practices: Provide the page topic, primary keyword, audience, brand name, and desired tone.
Review character counts and rewrite any option that reads forced or unclear.
Test several title and description angles before selecting the final version.
anti_patterns: Do not stuff the same keyword into every phrase.
Do not approve metadata without checking length and readability.
Do not use generic calls to action that could fit any page.

faq.question: Does this skill generate complete SEO metadata packages?
faq.answer: Yes. It can produce URL suggestions, title tags, meta descriptions, variations, and character count checks.

faq.question: Can it perform keyword research?
faq.answer: No. It works best when you provide target keywords, audience details, and page context.

faq.question: Does it guarantee higher rankings?
faq.answer: No. It improves metadata quality, but rankings also depend on content, authority, competition, and technical SEO.

faq.question: Can it help with WordPress SEO plugins?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill includes guidance for Yoast and RankMath settings based on the generated metadata.

faq.question: Can developers use it with static sites?
faq.answer: Yes. It can suggest metadata fields and implementation notes for Astro, Next.js, and similar frameworks.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The reviewed file contains SEO writing instructions, and the static security alerts were false positives.
